title: PlayerPortals
description: Custom portals for players to build and teleport to different worlds through multiverse core
body:
![Portals you can create, vertical and horizontal support.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a476489139efa85ef4119a6015550b392add36c_0.webp)



### An immersive world-to-world traveling method for your server!


- Players can build and activate portals in **survival mode**.
- Portals can be linked to different worlds through **multiverse-core.** 
- Includes support for both vertical and horizontal portals with tons of **customization** options that allow you to tweak particles, portal blocks, teleport messages, ignition items, and more.
- Everything can be managed through simple in-game commands or the config, making setup easy.

Can be used without **Multiverse-core**, however you can only travel between the nether and end.
I suggest using world generation plugins like **Terra** to create your own custom "dimensions" to travel between.

||THIS IS NOT A AETHER PLUGIN|| There is no world generation only portals.
